leadership.name: David Kim
leadership.shortBio: Visionary leader shaping digital brands worldwide.
leadership.fullBio: David is a visionary leader with over 15 years of experience in digital design and brand strategy. He has led teams at top agencies before founding Pixora to revolutionize how brands connect with audiences through immersive digital experiences.

leadership.name: Sarah Mitchell
leadership.shortBio: Strategic mind driving company growth and innovation.
leadership.fullBio: Sarah brings strategic expertise from her background in business development and tech innovation. She co-founded Pixora with a mission to build a company that values creativity, technology, and people above all else.

team.name: Maleesha
team.shortBio: React, Vue.js, TypeScript expert building scalable web applications.
team.fullBio: Maleesha is a passionate frontend developer with 5 years of experience specializing in React, Vue.js, and TypeScript. She loves creating performant, accessible user interfaces and contributing to open-source projects.

team.name: Jason Chen
team.shortBio: Award-winning designer specializing in user-centered design systems.
team.fullBio: Jason is an award-winning UI/UX designer with a keen eye for detail and a passion for creating intuitive digital experiences. He specializes in design systems and has worked with Fortune 500 companies.

team.name: Sarah Williams
team.shortBio: Full-stack engineer focused on Node.js, Python, and cloud architecture.
team.fullBio: Sarah is a skilled backend developer with expertise in Node.js, Python, and cloud architecture. She builds robust APIs and microservices that power high-traffic applications serving millions of users.

team.name: Alex Rivera
team.shortBio: PMP-certified PM ensuring timely delivery within budget.
team.fullBio: Alex is a PMP-certified project manager with a track record of delivering complex projects on time and within budget. He excels at cross-functional team coordination and stakeholder communication.

team.name: Emma Thompson
team.shortBio: Growth marketing specialist driving ROI through data-driven campaigns.
team.fullBio: Emma is a results-driven digital marketer who leverages data analytics to optimize campaigns and maximize ROI. She has experience across SEO, PPC, social media, and content marketing strategies.

team.name: David Park
team.shortBio: Infrastructure expert managing CI/CD pipelines and cloud deployments.
team.fullBio: David is a DevOps engineer specializing in infrastructure automation, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployments. He ensures our systems are scalable, reliable, and secure.

team.name: Lisa Anderson
team.shortBio: Quality assurance specialist ensuring bug-free product launches.
team.fullBio: Lisa leads our QA efforts with meticulous attention to detail. She implements comprehensive testing strategies including automated testing, performance testing, and security audits.

team.name: Mike Johnson
team.shortBio: React Native and Flutter expert creating cross-platform experiences.
team.fullBio: Mike is a mobile development specialist proficient in both React Native and Flutter. He creates beautiful, performant cross-platform applications that users love.

team.name: Nina Patel
team.shortBio: Analytics expert turning data into actionable insights and strategies.
team.fullBio: Nina is a data scientist who transforms complex datasets into actionable business insights. She uses machine learning and statistical modeling to drive data-informed decision making.
